title: Bielefeld, North Rhine-Westphalia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Bielefeld is a city in North Rhine-Westphalia with a population of 334,000. A green city in the Teutoburg Forest, known for its university, thriving food industry, and the famous Bielefeld conspiracy meme.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
